formulas.name: Basic Move
formulas.description: Roll 2d6 plus stat. After importing, replace +0 with your stat, such as +2 or -1, then interpret 10+/7–9/6- per your playbook.

formulas.name: With +1 Forward
formulas.description: +1 forward example. After importing, replace +0 with your stat, such as +2 or -1, and keep or adjust the +1 bonus.
